notes: Official-source/search-index rare signal seeds used only when a state source is WAF-protected, PDF-only, or policy/calendar-based. These are not claimed as live inventory unless signalType says inventory.

OR.evidence: Oregon Liquor Search is a state locator for distilled spirits and stores that carry them; collector verifies locator surface. Bottle is high-priority watchlist target for this source.

Oregon Liquor Search supports product/store lookup; Weller Antique 107 is tracked as allocated watchlist target.
